Name: ESTUS_FLASK_MAX_REINFORCE_PARAM
Description: Defines the minimum starting reinforcement level and maximum reinforcement level allowed for the Estus Flask.

Fields.Name: Minimum Level
Fields.Description: The starting reinforcement level assigned to the Estus Flask when the game begins or when the flask system is initialized.

Fields.Name: Maximum Level
Fields.Description: The highest reinforcement level the Estus Flask can reach through upgrades.
